watched.title: The Intouchables
watched.overview: A true story of two men who should never have met – a quadriplegic aristocrat who was injured in a paragliding accident and a young man from the projects.
watched.review: Весёлый и интересный фильм о счастье в жизни.

watched.title: Emily in Paris
watched.overview: New passions. New fashions. New Emily? A plucky American marketing whiz spreads her wings in life and love after landing her dream job in Paris.
watched.review: Интересный и добрый сериал про весёлую и наполненную жизнь.

watched.title: Ted Lasso
watched.overview: Ted Lasso, an American football coach, moves to England when he's hired to manage a soccer team—despite having no experience. With cynical players and a doubtful town, will he get them to see the Ted Lasso Way?
watched.review: Каждая серия сериала пронизана тем, как открытость к миру позволяет достигать высот. Тед всегда смотрит на ситуацию с позитивной стороны и несмотря на проблемы и сложности делает выводы и двигается вперёд.

watched.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
watched.overview: Andy Sachs returns to Runway as Miranda Priestly navigates a new media landscape and Runway's position within. The duo reconnect with former assistant Emily Charlton, now the head of a luxury brand that possesses funding which could ensure Runway's survival.
watched.review: Интересный фильм про то, как важно оставаться человеком.

watched.title: Why Him?
watched.overview: A dad forms a bitter rivalry with his daughter's young rich boyfriend.
watched.review: Смешной добрый фильм с прикольными моментами из мира хайтек.

watched.title: Arrival
watched.overview: Taking place after alien crafts land around the world, an expert linguist is recruited by the military to determine whether they come in peace or are a threat.

watched.title: Law Abiding Citizen
watched.overview: A frustrated man decides to take justice into his own hands after a plea bargain sets one of his family's killers free. He targets not only the killer but also the district attorney and others involved in the deal.
watched.review: Зрелищный фильм об изобретательной мести. Герой -- гений, который чётко продумал последовательность от него независящих действий на 1000 шагов в перёд и вводит этим всех в недоумение.

watched.title: Interstellar
watched.overview: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.
watched.review: Невероятная игра актёров и музыка погружают в атмосферу и заставляют переживать все события вместе с героями. Фильм пронизан трудными решениями и открытым финалом: жив ли Купер?

watched.title: Woodwalkers
watched.overview: Humans who can shapeshift into animals struggle to integrate with others without revealing their special abilities. As a group, they strive to inform and institute change in the perspective of deforestation and the importance of natural habitats. However, when that cannot happen, they're forced to take matters into their own hands.

watched.title: Me Before You
watched.overview: Lou Clark, a directionless 26-year-old from the English countryside, takes a job at the local castle as a caregiver and companion to a wealthy young banker, Will Traynor. Wheelchair-bound from an accident two years prior, the once adventurous Will has all but given up — that is until Lou determines to show him that life is worth living.
watched.review: Классный, добрый фильм про любовь и радости жизни.

watched.title: The Hunger Games
watched.overview: In a dystopian society where the Capitol forces each district to send two young tributes to fight to the death in a televised spectacle, a girl volunteers to take her sister’s place, setting the stage for a struggle of survival and defiance.

watched.title: Gone Girl
watched.overview: With his wife's disappearance having become the focus of an intense media circus, a man sees the spotlight turned on him when it's suspected that he may not be innocent.
watched.review: Фильм с совершенно неожиданным и удивительным сюжетный поворотом.

watched.title: Joy
watched.overview: A story based on the life of a struggling Long Island single mom who became one of the country's most successful entrepreneurs.
watched.review:
![[joy.jpeg]]

Фильм о невероятно доброй девушке, которая несмотря на все трудности преследует свою цель, при этом не забывая о морали и чести. Даже в самые сложные моменты, она помогает своим близким, хотя те ее совершенно не поддерживают, а наоборот говорят, что ничего не выйдет. Все вокруг пытаются ей навредить, кто-то случайно, а кто-то специально.
Джой, главная героиня, -- невероятная изобретательница. Ее невозможно остановить, она всегда идет вперед и в итоге добивается успеха. Получив известность, она продолжает помогать таким же изобретателям решать те проблемы, которые преследовали ее на этом пути. Джой полностью открыта миру и излучает только добро.  
Фильм вдохновляет и воодушевляет.

watched.title: The Devil Wears Prada
watched.overview: A young woman from the Midwest gets more than she bargained for when she moves to New York to become a writer and ends up as the assistant to the tyrannical, larger-than-life editor-in-chief of a major fashion magazine.
watched.review: Интересный фильм про усердную и трудную работу.

watched.title: The Founder
watched.overview: The true story of how Ray Kroc, a salesman from Illinois, met Mac and Dick McDonald, who were running a burger operation in 1950s Southern California. Kroc was impressed by the brothers’ speedy system of making the food and saw franchise potential. He maneuvered himself into a position to be able to pull the company from the brothers and create a billion-dollar empire.

watched.title: Parasite
watched.overview: All unemployed, Ki-taek's family takes peculiar interest in the wealthy and glamorous Parks for their livelihood until they get entangled in an unexpected incident.
watched.review: Фильм о пропасти между бедными и богатыми.

watched.title: Moneyball
watched.overview: The story of Oakland Athletics general manager Billy Beane's successful attempt to put together a baseball team on a budget, by employing computer-generated analysis to draft his players.
watched.review:
"Человек, изменивший всё" — фильм, основанный на реальных событиях, про статистику и математику в игре бейсбол.

Бейсбольный клуб, имеющий скудное финансирование, нуждается в новшествах при наборе игроков. Без денег, по-другому им никак не достичь высот. 

Менеджер клуба находит молодого парня, который производит оценку игроков основываясь исключительно на статистике. Он находит спортсменов, имеющих хорошие показатели в нужных областях, но при этом сильно недооценённых при привычных методах набора команды. Вместе, они набирают таких людей, закрывая разные позиции. 

Никто не верит в эту систему, герои терпят много неудач. В основном, из-за ошибок тренера, который ведёт игру "по-старому". Так проигрывается игра за игрой. 
Но решая все трудности, получается поставить невероятный рекорд и выйти в финал. 

Герои мечтают и верят, что можно изменить положение дел. Доказать, что команды без большого финансирования, также могут достигать побед. Раньше это считалось невозможным, но у них действительно получилось.

watched.title: The Imitation Game
watched.overview: Based on the real life story of legendary cryptanalyst Alan Turing, the film portrays the nail-biting race against time by Turing and his brilliant team of code-breakers at Britain's top-secret Government Code and Cypher School at Bletchley Park, during the darkest days of World War II.
watched.review: Отличный фильм про приверженность к своему делу и заинтересованность в достижении успеха, несмотря на угнетения и упрёки со стороны.

watchlist.title: Bob Trevino Likes It
watchlist.overview: Lily Trevino unexpectedly befriends an online stranger who shares her self-centered father’s name. This new Bob Trevino’s support could transform her life.

watchlist.title: Believe Me: The Abduction of Lisa McVey
watchlist.originalTitle: Believe Me: The Abduction of Lisa McVey
watchlist.overview: On the night she plans on taking her own life, 17-year-old 'Lisa McVey' is kidnapped and finds herself fighting to stay alive and is raped. She manages to talk her attacker into releasing her, but when she returns home, no one believes her story except for one detective, who suspects she was abducted by a serial killer. Based on horrifying true events.

watchlist.title: Decision to Leave
watchlist.overview: From a mountain peak in South Korea, a man plummets to his death. Did he jump, or was he pushed? When detective Hae-joon arrives on the scene, he begins to suspect the dead man’s wife Seo-rae. But as he digs deeper into the investigation, he finds himself trapped in a web of deception and desire.

watchlist.title: Dumb Money
watchlist.overview: Vlogger Keith Gill sinks his life savings into GameStop stock and posts about it. When social media starts blowing up, so do his life and the lives of everyone following him. As a stock tip becomes a movement, everyone gets rich—until the billionaires fight back, and both sides find their worlds turned upside down.

watchlist.title: Into the Wild
watchlist.overview: After graduating from Emory University in 1992, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire $24,000 savings account to charity, and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness.

watchlist.title: The Greatest Showman
watchlist.overview: The story of American showman P.T. Barnum, founder of the circus that became the famous traveling Ringling Bros. and Barnum & Bailey Circus.

watchlist.title: The Ultimate Gift
watchlist.overview: When his wealthy grandfather finally dies, Jason Stevens fully expects to benefit when it comes to the reading of the will. But instead of a sizable inheritance, Jason receives a test, a series of tasks he must complete before he can get any money.

watchlist.title: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
watchlist.originalTitle: Harry Potter and the Philosopher's Stone
watchlist.overview: Harry Potter has lived under the stairs at his aunt and uncle's house his whole life. But on his 11th birthday, he learns he's a powerful wizard—with a place waiting for him at the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry. As he learns to harness his newfound powers with the help of the school's kindly headmaster, Harry uncovers the truth about his parents' deaths—and about the villain who's to blame.

watchlist.title: Mean Girls
watchlist.overview: Cady Heron is a hit with The Plastics, the A-list girl clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for Aaron Samuels, the ex-boyfriend of alpha Plastic Regina George.

watchlist.title: The Menu
watchlist.overview: A young couple travels to a remote island to eat at an exclusive restaurant where the chef has prepared a lavish menu, with some shocking surprises.

watchlist.title: The Social Dilemma
watchlist.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.

watchlist.title: Legally Blonde
watchlist.overview: Fashionable sorority queen Elle Woods has it all, but, she wants nothing more than to be Mrs. Warner Huntington III. But he dumps her before heading to Harvard Law School. Elle rallies all of her resources and gets into Harvard, determined to win him back. While there, she figures out that there is more to herself than just good looks.

watchlist.title: The School for Good and Evil
watchlist.originalTitle: The School for Good and Evil
watchlist.overview: Best friends Sophie and Agatha navigate an enchanted school for young heroes and villains — and find themselves on opposing sides of the battle between good and evil.

watchlist.title: Lucy
watchlist.overview: A woman, accidentally caught in a dark deal, turns the tables on her captors and transforms into a merciless warrior evolved beyond human logic.

watchlist.title: Zootopia 2
watchlist.overview: After cracking the biggest case in Zootopia's history, rookie cops Judy Hopps and Nick Wilde find themselves on the twisting trail of a great mystery when Gary De'Snake arrives and turns the animal metropolis upside down. To crack the case, Judy and Nick must go undercover to unexpected new parts of town, where their growing partnership is tested like never before.

watchlist.title: Jeanne du Barry
watchlist.overview: The life of Jeanne Bécu, who was born as the illegitimate daughter of an impoverished seamstress in 1743 and went on to rise through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress.

watchlist.title: Anna Karenina
watchlist.overview: In Imperial Russia, Anna, wife of the officer Karenin, goes to Moscow to visit her brother. On the way, she meets charming cavalry officer Vronsky, to whom she's immediately attracted. But in St. Petersburg’s high society, a relationship like this could destroy a woman’s reputation.

watchlist.title: Return to Sender
watchlist.overview: A nurse mistakes a stranger who pays her a visit for her blind date and soon, the man rapes her and turns her life upside down. The woman works to reclaim her life and exact revenge on her assailant after he's paroled from prison.

watchlist.title: The Fourth Kind
watchlist.overview: Since the 1960s, a disproportionate number of the population in and around Nome, Alaska, have gone missing. Despite FBI investigations, the disappearances remain a mystery. Dr. Abigail Tyler, a psychologist, may be on the verge of blowing the unsolved cases wide open when, during the course of treating her patients, she finds evidence of alien abductions.

watchlist.title: Companion
watchlist.overview: During a weekend getaway at a secluded lakeside estate, a group of friends finds themselves entangled in a web of secrets, deception, and advanced technology. As tensions rise and loyalties are tested, they uncover unsettling truths about themselves and the world around them.

watchlist.title: Lovers of Mathematics
watchlist.overview: The world of mathematics is not only formulas and numbers, but also people who inspire and drive progress. Stories about those who not only solve equations, but also seek answers to questions that can change the future.

watchlist.title: Sleepy Hollow
watchlist.overview: The film based on the story of the American writer Washington Irving "The Legend of Sleepy Hollow" tells about the relationship of a person "suffering" from "teacher's syndrome" with his environment.

watchlist.title: The Blonde
watchlist.overview: Ira is 27 years old. And from the point of view of her mother, the director of the school, Ira lives absolutely wrong: she plays in the troupe of a small theater, earns money by washing windows and is in love with an unreliable creative person Leo, an aspiring director. She ignores "normal" men and does not even want to dye her hair blonde, which, according to her mother, is an easy way to success in her personal life. This state of affairs could continue for a long time, but the theater is on the verge of closing, and Lev suddenly disappears.

watchlist.title: The Mist
watchlist.overview: After a violent storm, a dense cloud of mist envelops a small Maine town, trapping David Drayton and his five-year-old son in a local grocery store with other local residents. They soon discover that the mist conceals deadly horrors that threaten their lives, and worse, their sanity.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. Simran is the daughter of Chaudhary Baldev Singh, who in spite of being an NRI is very strict about adherence to Indian values. Simran has left for India to be married to her childhood fiancé. Raj leaves for India with a mission at his hands, to claim his lady love under the noses of her whole family. Thus begins a saga.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. The Romance and Comedy angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Forrest Gump
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. But despite all he has achieved, his one true love eludes him.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A man with a low IQ has accomplished great things in his life and been present during significant historic events—in each case, far exceeding what anyone imagined he could do. The Romance and Comedy angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: My Dearest Assassin
deterministicDiscoveries.originalTitle: เลือดรักนักฆ่า
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces. The Romance and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: A Dog's Will
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: The lively João Grilo and the sly Chicó are poor guys living in the hinterland who cheat a bunch of people in a small town in Northeastern Brazil. When they die, they have to be judged by Christ, the Devil and the Virgin Mary before they are admitted to paradise.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: The lively João Grilo and the sly Chicó are poor guys living in the hinterland who cheat a bunch of people in a small town in Northeastern Brazil. The Romance and Comedy angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Back to the Future
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Eighties teenager Marty McFly is accidentally sent back in time to 1955, inadvertently disrupting his parents' first meeting and attracting his mother's romantic interest. Marty must repair the damage to history by rekindling his parents' romance and - with the help of his eccentric inventor friend Doc Brown - return to 1985.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Eighties teenager Marty McFly is accidentally sent back in time to 1955, inadvertently disrupting his parents' first meeting and attracting his mother's romantic interest. The Romance and Adventure angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Inception
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered to be impossible: "inception", the implantation of another person's idea into a target's subconscious.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Cobb, a skilled thief who commits corporate espionage by infiltrating the subconscious of his targets is offered a chance to regain his old life as payment for a task considered... The Adventure and Science Fiction angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Life Is Beautiful
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A touching story of an Italian book seller of Jewish ancestry who lives in his own little fairy tale. His creative and happy life would come to an abrupt halt when his entire family is deported to a concentration camp during World War II. While locked up he tries to convince his son that the whole thing is just a game.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A touching story of an Italian book seller of Jewish ancestry who lives in his own little fairy tale. The Comedy and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Modern Times
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: A bumbling tramp desires to build a home with a young woman, yet is thwarted time and time again by his lack of experience and habit of being in the wrong place at the wrong time...
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: A bumbling tramp desires to build a home with a young woman, yet is thwarted time and time again by his lack of experience and habit of being in the wrong place at the wrong tim... The Romance and Comedy angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters the Spider Society, a team of Spider-People charged with protecting the Multiverse's very existence. But when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders and must set out on his own to save those he loves most.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn’s full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters the Spider Society, a team of Sp... The Adventure and Science Fiction angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: Struggling to find his place in the world while juggling school and family, Brooklyn teenager Miles Morales is unexpectedly bitten by a radioactive spider and develops unfathomable powers just like the one and only Spider-Man. While wrestling with the implications of his new abilities, Miles discovers a super collider created by the madman Wilson "Kingpin" Fisk, causing others from across the Spider-Verse to be inadvertently transported to his dimension.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: Struggling to find his place in the world while juggling school and family, Brooklyn teenager Miles Morales is unexpectedly bitten by a radioactive spider and develops unfathoma... The Adventure and Science Fiction angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: The Empire Strikes Back
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: The epic saga continues as Luke Skywalker, in hopes of defeating the evil Galactic Empire, learns the ways of the Jedi from aging master Yoda. But Darth Vader is more determined than ever to capture Luke. Meanwhile, rebel leader Princess Leia, cocky Han Solo, Chewbacca, and droids C-3PO and R2-D2 are thrown into various stages of capture, betrayal and despair.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: The epic saga continues as Luke Skywalker, in hopes of defeating the evil Galactic Empire, learns the ways of the Jedi from aging master Yoda. The Adventure and Science Fiction angle is the clearest fit.

deterministicDiscoveries.title: Violet Evergarden: The Movie
deterministicDiscoveries.originalTitle: 劇場版 ヴァイオレット・エヴァーガーデン
deterministicDiscoveries.overview: As the world moves on from the war and technological advances bring changes to her life, Violet still hopes to see her lost commanding officer again.
deterministicDiscoveries.rationale: As the world moves on from the war and technological advances bring changes to her life, Violet still hopes to see her lost commanding officer again. The Romance and Drama angle is the clearest fit.

aiDiscoveries.title: The Pursuit of Happyness
aiDiscoveries.overview: A struggling salesman takes custody of his son as he's poised to begin a life-changing professional career.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A heartfelt drama about a struggling salesman who becomes a father and faces homelessness while persevering to secure a better future for his son, echoing the uplifting determination seen in "Joy" and the resilience in "The Intouchables".

aiDiscoveries.title: Little Miss Sunshine
aiDiscoveries.overview: A family loaded with quirky, colorful characters piles into an old van and road trips to California for little Olive to compete in a beauty pageant.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A quirky family road trip comedy-drama where eccentric relatives unite to support a young girl's beauty pageant dream, reflecting the warm, supportive tone of "Me Before You" and the inventive problem‑solving in "Moneyball".

aiDiscoveries.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
aiDiscoveries.overview: The Grand Budapest Hotel tells of a legendary concierge at a famous European hotel between the wars and his friendship with a young employee who becomes his trusted protégé. The story involves the theft and recovery of a priceless Renaissance painting, the battle for an enormous family fortune and the slow and then sudden upheavals that transformed Europe during the first half of the 20th century.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A visually inventive comedy‑adventure set in a whimsical hotel, blending meticulous craft and quirky humor reminiscent of the stylized storytelling in "The Devil Wears Prada" and the inventive spirit of "The Imitation Game".

aiDiscoveries.title: The Martian
aiDiscoveries.overview: During a manned mission to Mars, Astronaut Mark Watney is presumed dead after a fierce storm and left behind by his crew. But Watney has survived and finds himself stranded and alone on the hostile planet. With only meager supplies, he must draw upon his ingenuity, wit and spirit to subsist and find a way to signal to Earth that he is alive.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: An intelligent sci‑fi survival story where an astronaut uses scientific reasoning and resourcefulness to survive alone on Mars, echoing the problem‑solving mindset of "Moneyball" and the optimistic perseverance in "The Pursuit of Happyness".

aiDiscoveries.title: Chef
aiDiscoveries.overview: When Chef Carl Casper suddenly quits his job at a prominent Los Angeles restaurant after refusing to compromise his creative integrity for its controlling owner, he is left to figure out what's next. Finding himself in Miami, he teams up with his ex-wife, his friend and his son to launch a food truck. Taking to the road, Chef Carl goes back to his roots to reignite his passion for the kitchen -- and zest for life and love.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A feel‑good comedy about a chef who quits his high‑end restaurant, starts a food truck with his son, and rediscovers family bonds, reflecting the warm, life‑celebrating mood of "Me Before You" and the entrepreneurial spirit of "The Founder".

aiDiscoveries.title: The Theory of Everything
aiDiscoveries.overview: Once a healthy, active young man, Hawking received an earth-shattering diagnosis at 21 years of age. With Jane fighting tirelessly by his side, Stephen embarks on his most ambitious scientific work, studying the very thing he now has precious little of – time.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A biographical drama exploring Stephen Hawking's scientific breakthroughs and personal struggles, aligning with the historical depth of "The Imitation Game" and the dedication to a cause seen in "Moneyball".

aiDiscoveries.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
aiDiscoveries.originalTitle: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
aiDiscoveries.overview: A timid magazine photo manager who lives life vicariously through daydreams embarks on a true-life adventure when a negative goes missing.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: An adventurous comedy‑drama about a daydreamer who embarks on a global quest to find a missing photo for a magazine, capturing the spirit of exploration and self‑discovery present in "Interstellar" and the uplifting tone of "The Pursuit of Happyness".

aiDiscoveries.title: The Grandmaster
aiDiscoveries.overview: Ip Man's peaceful life in Foshan changes after Gong Yutian seeks an heir for his family in Southern China. Ip Man then meets Gong Er who challenges him for the sake of regaining her family's honor. After the Second Sino-Japanese War, Ip Man moves to Hong Kong and struggles to provide for his family. In the mean time, Gong Er chooses the path of vengeance after her father was killed by Ma San.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A martial‑arts drama chronicling the life of a legendary kung‑fu master, blending stylistic choreography with reflective storytelling reminiscent of the epic scope of "The Grand Budapest Hotel" and the disciplined dedication in "The Imitation Game".

aiDiscoveries.title: The Way Way Back
aiDiscoveries.overview: Shy 14-year-old Duncan goes on summer vacation with his mother, her overbearing boyfriend, and her boyfriend's daughter. Having a rough time fitting in, Duncan finds an unexpected friend in Owen, manager of the Water Wizz water park.
aiDiscoveries.rationale: A coming‑of‑age comedy‑drama about a teenage boy navigating summer holidays with a charismatic family friend, echoing the youthful optimism and supportive relationships found in "Little Miss Sunshine" and "Chef".
